behavior_summary: This script implements the in-game behavior for the NPC Shaana. It provides a 'U8P_SHAANA::look' (examine) handler that chooses a short bark based on whether Shaana is dead and on two global flags (shaanaName, shaanaJob).

It manages Shaana's movement schedule via schedule(), selecting and storing a schedule id/range in a global (shaanaSchedule) based on world state (toranDead, secondexecution, and the NPC's live/dead state) and spawning engine methods to apply it.
enterFastArea and leaveFastArea provide fast-entry/exit triggers around Shaana that quickly spawn short routines (movement/idle/area-specific behaviors) or perform fast-area cleanup.

Two longer routines (U8P_SHAANA::029E and U8P_SHAANA::03B0) drive patrol/pathfinding and repeated orientation/taunt sequences by iterating waypoint lists, spawning engine pathfinding/animation methods, and occasionally emitting short barks.

A use handler (U8P_SHAANA::use) (inferred) controls direct interaction/dialogue branching using many global flags (shaanaMet, hydrosFree, pyrosFree, hasHeart, devonInRule) and random rolls to pick first-meeting vs normal conversation or refusal responses.
notable_control_flow: U8P_SHAANA::look: immediately checks Npc::isDead; if dead barks corpse text and returns; otherwise checks global shaanaName then shaanaJob to pick name/job/generic genders and barks the chosen string.

U8P_SHAANA::schedule: reads toranDead and secondexecution (and Npc::isDead), queries FREE::28F9, selects schedule parameters, writes shaanaSchedule, then spawns engine METHODS (e.g., METHOD::143A, METHOD::133F) to apply the schedule and waits/suspends for spawned results.

U8P_SHAANA::enterFastArea: fast-path entry handler reads Npc::isDead and Npc::getMap and global devonInRule to decide whether to spawn U8P_SHAANA::029E, spawn a map-specific routine, or set the NPC activity via Npc::cSetActivity(0); it uses FREE::2A56 for fast-area bookkeeping.

U8P_SHAANA::029E and U8P_SHAANA::03B0: loop over small indexed lists (waypoints/entries). 029E invokes pathfinding and either spawns 03B0 or runs orientation/animation METHODs; 03B0 obtains directions with Item::getDirToItem and repeatedly spawns turn/move METHODs and occasional bark lines.

U8P_SHAANA::use (inferred): complex branching based on multiple globals (shaanaMet, hydrosFree, pyrosFree, hasHeart, devonInRule) and urandom; may refuse to talk, emit randomized flavor lines, or spawn first-meeting vs normal conversation routines.
Loop/frame progression inside U8P_SHAANA::schedule; treated as control-flow, not explicit internal call.
open_questions: Exact semantics and return values of FREE::1C19, FREE::28F9, and FREE::2A56 — they appear to be scheduling/fast-area/query helpers but their precise contracts are unknown.
Precise schedule identifiers, their timing semantics, and how shaanaSchedule is interpreted elsewhere in the game.
Complete contents and branching in U8P_SHAANA::use: the excerpt infers many dialog branches but the exact text and some branches are not present in the extracted snippet.
Whether any spawn METHOD numbers (e.g., METHOD::143A, METHOD::133F, METHOD::15E7, METHOD::091C) have side effects beyond movement/animation (they likely do but exact effects are engine-level).
Edge cases when the NPC is dead combined with world flags (e.g., how schedule() behaves if Shaana is dead) — behavior is inferred but not exhaustively confirmed.

main_function.name: U8P_SHAANA::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the player 'U8P_SHAANA::look' (examine) event for Shaana: choose and emit a short bark based on Shaana's alive/dead state and two global flags that control whether the NPC's name or job is used, otherwise fall back to a generic gender term.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_SHAANA::look): triggered when a player/process examines or 'looks at' Shaana.

function_map.name: U8P_SHAANA::look
function_map.role: Public U8P_SHAANA::look/examine handler that selects short bark text (name/job/generic/corpse) and emits it to the viewer.

function_map.name: U8P_SHAANA::schedule
function_map.role: Select and apply Shaana's movement/activity schedule based on world flags and NPC state; writes global shaanaSchedule and spawns engine schedule methods.

function_map.name: U8P_SHAANA::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-entry trigger to quickly spawn movement/behavior routines or set activity when the avatar enters Shaana's area.

function_map.name: U8P_SHAANA::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-exit cleanup for area triggers; calls FREE::2A56 for bookkeeping.

function_map.name: U8P_SHAANA::029E
function_map.role: Looped patrol/pathfinding routine that iterates waypoint entries and spawns pathfinding and orientation actions.

function_map.name: U8P_SHAANA::03B0
function_map.role: Looped orientation/movement/taunt routine used by the patrol behavior; repeatedly orients and occasionally barks/taunts.

function_map.name: U8P_SHAANA::use
function_map.role: Direct-interaction (use/talk) handler that branches dialog and meeting routines based on multiple world flags and random selection; inferred from surrounding context.

function_map.name: Npc::isDead
function_map.role: Engine/extern check used throughout to determine whether the NPC is dead.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/extern call to emit short text/bark from the NPC/item to a target player/process.

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn the patrol/path routine when certain map/devonInRule conditions are met.
Occasionally spawn the shorter orientation/taunt loop as part of patrol behavior.

external_calls.purpose: Decide whether to use corpse text vs alive barks.
Emit the chosen short bark/phrase to the viewing player/process.
Query helper used during schedule selection (likely returns a state/schedule hint).
Apply or initiate the selected schedule via engine method spawn.
Secondary engine method spawn used after schedule selection (likely to start or finalize schedule).
Check the current map to select area-specific fast-entry behavior.
Set Shaana's activity/state (e.g., idle) when no routine is spawned.
Initiate pathfinding to waypoints as part of patrol routine.
Compute direction to a waypoint/item before spawning turn/movement actions.
Helper used inside patrol loop (likely for timing/cleanup decisions).
Choose randomized dialogue/behavior variants when interacting with Shaana.
Spawn an orientation/animation engine method during patrol sequences.

reads.name: toranDead
reads.likely_effect: Alters schedule selection in U8P_SHAANA::schedule (influences which schedule variant to pick).

reads.name: secondexecution
reads.likely_effect: Used with toranDead and other state to choose alternate schedule parameters.

reads.name: devonInRule
reads.likely_effect: Controls map-specific fast-area behavior in U8P_SHAANA::enterFastArea and influences dialogue branches in use().

reads.name: shaanaName
reads.likely_effect: If set, U8P_SHAANA::look barks Shaana's name instead of job/generic term.

reads.name: shaanaJob
reads.likely_effect: If shaanaName is not set, controls whether U8P_SHAANA::look barks 'executioner' instead of a generic term.

reads.name: shaanaMet
reads.likely_effect: Determines whether U8P_SHAANA::use will spawn a first-meeting dialog routine or normal conversation.

reads.name: hydrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Contributes to dialog/urgent-refusal logic in U8P_SHAANA::use (counts toward a threshold).

reads.name: pyrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Contributes to dialog/urgent-refusal logic in U8P_SHAANA::use (counts toward a threshold).

reads.name: hasHeart
reads.likely_effect: Affects dialog choices and warnings in U8P_SHAANA::use.

writes.name: shaanaSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Stores the chosen schedule id/parameters selected by U8P_SHAANA::schedule for use by spawned engine schedule methods and later logic.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the in-game behavior for the NPC Shaana. It provides a 'U8P_SHAANA::look' (examine) handler that chooses a short bark based on whether Shaana is dead and on two global flags (shaanaName, shaanaJob).
